name: aispecflow
description: Full development lifecycle: repo discovery → requirements grill → spec-driven design → TDD implementation → code review → archive → docs refresh

interface.shortDescription: Full development lifecycle: discover, grill, spec, TDD, review, archive, refresh docs
interface.longDescription: Axl Dev Flow provides a complete development lifecycle plugin with 7 skills. Start with repo discovery to understand your project, grill requirements until they're solid, generate OpenSpec artifacts (proposal/specs/design/tasks), implement with test-driven development, code review via subagent, archive completed changes, and auto-refresh project documentation to stay in sync.
defaultPrompt: Start full dev flow: discover my project and let's build something
I have a new feature idea — let's grill it before we code
